title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, The Man Company in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!
